reference: I have no animals, but there is a serious infestation of fleas where I used to work in home health aid. I went to the doctor and received creams and two different tablets. They help, but I continue being bitten. I am not working there anymore. It feels like there are things under my skin that itch badly. I have allergies, and my skin looks like I was beaten with a rope.
text: I have no animals, but there is a serious infestation at Leeds where I used to work in home health care. I went to the doctor and received steam within two different tablets. Then helped, but I continued being bitten. I am not working there anymore. It feels like there are things under my skin that itch badly. I have allergies, and my skin looks like I was eating with my nose.
